$comment: Layer C for REBATE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (file I/O stage 2b, docs/memory-layout.md). The record is a fixed-width group: record k binds each non-filler field to input variable k*F+j (F = 2 numeric fields R-ID and R-AMOUNT). Layer C recomputes the byte layout from the DataItem tree and asserts it matches the IR's before executing. The READ inside the PERFORM UNTIL loop forks the record count through the unroller; per record the threshold branch (R-AMOUNT >= 100.00) and the 2% rebate rounding half-boundary are the obligations. baseCase lines are raw 13-byte records decoded through the layout.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REBATE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-rebate, record-stream wrapper)
